steps.title: Find the total tile count
steps.content:
Each tile represents $7$ square inches, so divide the equation by $7$.
$$7g+7b=840$$
$$g+b=120$$

steps.title: Subtract the blue tiles
steps.content:
The artist needs $71$ blue tiles, so substitute $b=71$.
$$g+71=120$$
$$g=120-71$$
The answer is 49.
